title: verbesina guatemalensis var. guatemalensis
intro: Verbesina guatemalensis var. guatemalensis is a plant species in the daisy family, known for its medicinal and aromatic properties. It is rich in flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, colds, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits, including its ability to soothe inflammation and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Verbesina guatemalensis var. guatemalensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
